article_meta.title: Facebook X Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy and CNN’s Clarissa Ward on the state of the war | The Conversation 02

reasoning: No attribution violations and two clearly biased author phrases were correctly flagged, but the model missed several other clear instances of loaded author prose and included one marginal/overstated item.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged text comes from the author’s prose, not from quotations or attributed statements.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: “Democrats have long dreamed of turning Texas blue” is a mild narrative flourish and arguably neutral context; flagging it as Spin is somewhat overreaching. The other two items are solid.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed multiple clear author-level biases: e.g., “staggering price tag,” “easily dispatched,” “stubbornly low approval rating,” “struggling mightily,” labeling Cornyn a “moderate” without attribution, and “Republicans… scoff at the idea.”
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Labels applied appropriately: subjective qualifiers for “scandal-ridden MAGA darling,” word choice for “appeared laughable,” and a defensible Spin label for the ‘dreamed of’ framing.
